info.description: OpenAPI projection of the media pillar's REST contract. Authored as a ts-rest contract (src/contract/rest.ts); consumed directly by polyglot clients and via openapi-typescript by TS consumers.
info.title: @pops/media

get.summary: Env-derived configuration state for Radarr + Sonarr
Combined Radarr + Sonarr download queue

post.summary: Add a movie to Radarr, create a library entry, mark it rotation-protected
Add a movie to Radarr

patch.summary: Toggle monitoring for a movie in Radarr

post.summary: Trigger a Radarr search for a movie

get.summary: Check whether a movie exists in Radarr by TMDB id
Get the Radarr status of a movie by TMDB id
List Radarr quality profiles
List Radarr root folders

post.summary: Test a Radarr connection with creds supplied in the request body
Test the env-configured Radarr connection

get.summary: Read-only env-derived arr settings (URLs + presence flags; no key values)
List upcoming episodes from the Sonarr calendar
List Sonarr language profiles
List Sonarr quality profiles
List Sonarr root folders

post.summary: Add a series to Sonarr

get.summary: List episodes for a series, optionally filtered by season

post.summary: Trigger a Sonarr search for a series or a specific season

patch.summary: Toggle monitoring for a single season in Sonarr

get.summary: Check whether a series exists in Sonarr by TVDB id
Get the Sonarr status of a series by TVDB id

post.summary: Test a Sonarr connection with creds supplied in the request body
Test the env-configured Sonarr connection

get.summary: List comparison dimensions ordered by sort order (seeds defaults if empty)

post.summary: Create a comparison dimension

get.summary: Ranked media by ELO (per-dimension or overall, weight-blended)
Get ELO scores for a media item (optionally one dimension)

post.summary: Exclude a media item from a dimension (purges comparisons, recalc ELO)
Re-include a media item in a dimension

get.summary: Get staleness for a media item (default 1.0 = fresh)

post.summary: Mark a media item stale (×0.5 per call, floor 0.01)

get.summary: List all comparisons (optional dimension + movie-title search)

post.summary: Record a 1v1 comparison and update ELO on both media
Record a batch of comparisons in one transaction
Blacklist a movie: mark watch events, purge its comparisons, recalc ELO

get.summary: List comparisons involving a media item

post.summary: Replay every comparison and recalc ELO for all active dimensions
Record a skip (puts the pair on cooloff for 10 global comparisons)

get.summary: Pick a smart comparison pair (weighted-probabilistic, with random fallback)

delete.summary: Delete a comparison and recalc the affected dimension

get.summary: List the library (movies + TV shows) with filter / sort / pagination
List the distinct genres across the library

post.summary: Add a movie to the library by TMDB id (idempotent)

patch.summary: Refresh a library movie from TMDB

get.summary: Random unwatched movies to surface as a quick pick

post.summary: Add a TV show to the library by TheTVDB id (idempotent)

patch.summary: Refresh a library TV show from TheTVDB

get.summary: List movies with optional search / genre filters and pagination

post.summary: Create a movie

get.summary: Get a single movie by id

post.summary: Create a plex.tv auth PIN
Poll a plex.tv auth PIN; persists the token once authorised
Clear the persisted Plex token + username

get.summary: List the Plex server libraries (sections)

post.summary: Arm the periodic Plex sync scheduler (fires one tick immediately)

get.summary: Read the scheduler run state + last-sync stats

post.summary: Stop the periodic Plex sync scheduler

get.summary: List recent periodic-sync log entries (newest first)
Get the configured Plex library section ids

post.summary: Persist the Plex library section ids
Start an on-demand Plex sync job (runs async in-process)

get.summary: Connection-config snapshot (configured / hasUrl / hasToken)
List currently-running sync jobs
Most recent completed result per sync job type
Poll a sync job by id (404 if unknown)
Test the configured Plex connection
Get the configured Plex server URL

post.summary: Validate + persist the Plex server URL

get.summary: Get the connected Plex username
List rotation candidates with status filter, search, and pagination

post.summary: Add a movie to the rotation queue (manual source)

get.summary: Get a movie’s queue + exclusion status

post.summary: Download a candidate (Radarr add + library entry + protect)

delete.summary: Remove a pending movie from the rotation queue

post.summary: Exclude a movie from rotation

delete.summary: Remove a movie from the exclusion list

get.summary: Get an exclusion entry by tmdbId
List Plex friends (degrades to empty when Plex is unconfigured)
Get rotation settings (with defaults for unset keys)

post.summary: Save rotation settings

get.summary: List registered source adapter types
List rotation sources with candidate counts

post.summary: Create a rotation source

delete.summary: Delete a rotation source and its candidates

post.summary: Sync a source (fetch candidates from its adapter)

get.summary: List the episodes of a season

post.summary: Create an episode under a season
Record impressions for one or more shelves
Run the impressions retention cleanup (idempotent)

get.summary: Get the impression count + freshness multiplier for a shelf
List per-shelf impression counts within the recent window

post.summary: Submit a tier list: placements → comparisons + tier overrides

get.summary: Get up to N movies for a tier-list placement round
List TV shows with optional search / status filters and pagination

post.summary: Create a TV show

get.summary: Get a single TV show by id
List the seasons of a TV show

post.summary: Create a season under a TV show

get.summary: List watch history entries with optional filters and pagination

post.summary: Log a watch event (auto-removes from watchlist on completion)
Batch-log watch events for all aired episodes of a season or show
Watch-completion percentage for a batch of TV shows

get.summary: Per-season + overall watch progress for a TV show
List recent watch history enriched with media metadata
Get a single watch history entry by id
List watchlist entries with optional mediaType filter and pagination

Batch-reorder watchlist items by priority

delete.summary: Remove an entry from the watchlist
